# Alt

## For future Claude
Alt is a vertically integrated sports card platform (portfolio + authenticated marketplace + physical vault) targeting premium ($1k+) graded cards. Relevant when: evaluating the premium segment of the market, understanding the vault/custody model as a possible future feature, or assessing whether Alt is a direct competitor for the SlabMetrics beachhead.
Key fact: Alt explicitly underserves the $50–$500 modern-graded beachhead — this is where SlabMetrics is targeting v1. Alt and SlabMetrics serve different price-point segments, making Alt more of a future competitive risk than an immediate one.

## TL;DR

Alt is a vertically integrated sports card platform: portfolio tracking, authenticated-only marketplace, and physical vault storage. Targets $1k+ premium graded cards. High transaction fees. Raised $106M. No decision intelligence. `[Likely]` — [[sources/alt-platform-features]]

## Core Products

- **Alt Portfolio**: Daily card valuations from comps; single-screen collection view sortable by value, gain/loss, purchase date. `[Certain]` — [[sources/alt-platform-features]]
- **Alt Exchange**: Fixed-price listings + timed auctions. Only graded, authenticated cards. Searchable by sport, player, year, grade, brand. `[Certain]` — [[sources/alt-platform-features]]
- **Alt Vault**: Physical secure storage in Delaware. Insured, high-res camera verification. Designed for active traders to avoid repeated shipping. `[Certain]` — [[sources/alt-platform-features]]
- **Alt Value**: Algorithmic daily card valuations using comps and "systematic market knowledge." `[Certain]` — [[sources/alt-platform-features]]
- **Alt Lending**: Card-backed loans using vault holdings as collateral. Planned — not launched as of source date. `[Likely]` — [[sources/alt-platform-features]]

## Fee Structure (verify at alt.xyz — may be dated)

| Transaction | Fee |
|---|---|
| Marketplace seller fee | 9% |
| Auction seller fee (vaulted) | 7% |
| Auction seller fee (non-vaulted) | 12.5% |
| Buyer premium at auction | 15% |
| Payment processing (buyer) | 3% |
| Private vault storage | ~$20/card/year |
| Listed-for-sale vault storage | Free |

`[Likely — sourced from third-party review and moneymade.io; verify current rates]` — [[sources/alt-platform-features]]

## Funding

$31M Series A + $75M Series B = $106M raised. Notable investors: Naval Ravikant (Spearhead), Tom Brady, Giannis Antetokounmpo, Kevin Durant, Alexis Ohanian, John & Patrick Collison (Stripe). `[Certain]` — [[sources/alt-platform-features]]

## Competitive Assessment (vs. SlabMetrics)

**Their advantage**: Vertically integrated (portfolio + marketplace + vault) in a way no other competitor is. Premium brand and celebrity investor credibility. Only authenticated graded cards creates quality signal.

**Their weakness**: Targets $1k+ cards — explicitly underserves the $50–$500 modern-graded segment that is SlabMetrics' v1 beachhead. High transaction fees create friction for common-price-point cards. No decision intelligence or signal synthesis. `[Certain]` — [[sources/alt-platform-features]]

**Overlap risk**: Low for v1. If SlabMetrics moves upmarket (post-PMF), Alt becomes more relevant as a competitive threat.
